summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries used in BESS are normally handled through dangerous-goods transport rules before they reach Kenya. UN Manual of Tests and Criteria subsection 38.3 test evidence, a test summary, proper UN number classification, packing instructions, marks / labels, and mode-specific air, sea, or road documents may be requested by carriers, freight forwarders, customs brokers, insurers, or Kenyan import reviewers.
summary.zh: BESS使用的锂电芯和电池在抵达肯尼亚前通常需按危险货物运输规则处理。承运人、货代、报关行、保险方或肯尼亚进口审查方可能要求UN《试验和标准手册》第38.3小节测试证据、测试摘要、正确UN编号分类、包装指令、标志/标签以及空运、海运或公路运输文件。
summary.zht: BESS使用的鋰電芯和電池在抵達肯亞前通常需按危險貨物運輸規則處理。承運人、貨代、報關行、保險方或肯亞進口審查方可能要求UN《試驗和標準手冊》第38.3小節測試證據、測試摘要、正確UN編號分類、包裝指令、標誌／標籤以及空運、海運或公路運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3
Mode-specific dangerous-goods rules such as ICAO / IATA, IMDG Code, or road transport rules used for the shipment
Kenya import and customs documentation where requested

summary.en: China exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 reports, MSDS / SDS, dangerous-goods classifications, and battery test summaries from Chinese laboratories. These documents should be checked for exact cell / battery model coverage, revision status, manufacturer identity, and shipment configuration.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有中国实验室出具的UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、危险货物分类及电池测试摘要。应核查这些文件是否准确覆盖电芯/电池型号、版本状态、制造商身份和货批配置。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有中國實驗室出具的UN 38.3報告、MSDS／SDS、危險貨物分類及電池測試摘要。應核查這些文件是否準確覆蓋電芯／電池型號、版本狀態、製造商身份和貨批配置。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Do not rely on a generic battery safety certificate as transport evidence. Match every shipped cell, module, rack, container, spare part, and installed battery configuration to UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods paperwork, including whether the battery is shipped separately, with equipment, contained in equipment, damaged, prototype, or for disposal / recycling.
gap.zh: 不要将通用电池安全证书作为运输证据。应将每个出运电芯、模组、电池架、集装箱、备件和已安装电池配置对应至UN 38.3及危险货物文件，并确认电池是单独运输、与设备同运、装在设备内、损坏、样品，还是用于处置/回收。
gap.zht: 不要將通用電池安全證書作為運輸證據。應將每個出運電芯、模組、電池架、集裝箱、備件和已安裝電池配置對應至UN 38.3及危險貨物文件，並確認電池是單獨運輸、與設備同運、裝在設備內、損壞、樣品，還是用於處置／回收。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium cells and batteries when dangerous-goods transport rules apply to the shipment route and mode
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where lithium battery dangerous-goods rules apply; China domestic product GB evidence does not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat UN 38.3 and mode-specific dangerous-goods paperwork as a separate transport gate for Kenya-bound BESS shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对发往肯尼亚的BESS货物，应将UN 38.3及运输方式特定危险货物文件作为独立运输关口处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對發往肯亞的BESS貨物，應將UN 38.3及運輸方式特定危險貨物文件作為獨立運輸關口處理。
